title: Find My Device - Allow location [Android]
scenario: When starting the app with HS connected, navigating to the App Menu and tapping on 'Find My Device', a location permission dialog appears with options: 'Always allow', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow'.
steps: Start the app with HS connected
expected: A location permission dialog appears with options: 'Always allow', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow'.
